findings.description: The knowledge file adds `ProjectInsertMessageResponseForm resForm;` as a local variable declaration before the if-block in the `onError` method. The source code does not include this declaration — `resForm` is used directly without being declared within the method body. While the addition makes the code compilable, it is content not present in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source onError body starts directly with `if (e instanceof InvalidDataFormatException) { resForm = new ProjectInsertMessageResponseForm(...)` — no local `resForm` declaration exists in the source.

findings.description: Three PascalCase class names used in the s1 code examples are absent from the hints: `BeanUtil`, `ValidatorUtil`, and `UniversalDao`. These classes are referenced directly in the `onReceive` implementation example.
